title: Skeensmp Season 7
description: The modpack used for the seventh season of the SkeensMP Minecraft Server. Kitchen-sink pack focused on exploration and building.
body:
This is the modpack used for the Seventh Season of the SkeensMP Minecraft Server. There is a large focus on exploration in vanilla generation with lots of structures. Uses the Create Mod for some technological innovation, and Custom Origins for lore purposes.

# Enter Skeenstopia
In this season server members are all invited to take part in the Skeenstopia initiative of creating one huge city together. Mods such as Farmer's Delight, Chipped, Create, and Trafficcraft enhance the city building experience, and MCA and Easy NPCs make this more immersive for the players
